verses.text: When God casts out the nations, make no marriages with them. No mixing. Holiness keeps them apart.
When God casts out the nations, make no marriages with them. No mixing. Holiness keeps them apart.
When God casts out the nations, make no marriages with them. No mixing. Holiness keeps them apart.
Lest they turn your children to idols; destroy their altars. Destroy. Idolatry must be uprooted.
Lest they turn your children to idols; destroy their altars. Destroy. Idolatry must be uprooted.
He did not love you because ye were many, but because He chose you. Chosen. Grace, not merit, called them.
He did not love you because ye were many, but because He chose you. Chosen. Grace, not merit, called them.
He did not love you because ye were many, but because He chose you. Chosen. Grace, not merit, called them.
He keeps covenant with them that love Him. Faithful. God repays love and judges hate.
He keeps covenant with them that love Him. Faithful. God repays love and judges hate.
He keeps covenant with them that love Him. Faithful. God repays love and judges hate.
Obey, and He will bless your land, your womb, and your flocks. Blessing. Obedience brings plenty.
Obey, and He will bless your land, your womb, and your flocks. Blessing. Obedience brings plenty.
Obey, and He will bless your land, your womb, and your flocks. Blessing. Obedience brings plenty.
Obey, and He will bless your land, your womb, and your flocks. Blessing. Obedience brings plenty.
Fear not the nations; remember what He did to Egypt. Remember. Past deliverance steels faith.
Fear not the nations; remember what He did to Egypt. Remember. Past deliverance steels faith.
Fear not the nations; remember what He did to Egypt. Remember. Past deliverance steels faith.
Fear not the nations; remember what He did to Egypt. Remember. Past deliverance steels faith.
The LORD among you is a mighty and terrible God. Mighty. He fights for His own.
The LORD among you is a mighty and terrible God. Mighty. He fights for His own.
He will drive them out little by little before you. Gradual. God's pace is wise.
He will drive them out little by little before you. Gradual. God's pace is wise.
He will drive them out little by little before you. Gradual. God's pace is wise.
Burn their idols; bring no cursed thing into your house. Abhor. Idols are an abomination.
Burn their idols; bring no cursed thing into your house. Abhor. Idols are an abomination.
